audit_items.proof_trace: The `onlyRole(Roles.AUCTION_WORKER_ROLE)` modifier at L307 enforces the access check on every external call to `performUpkeep`; there is no alternative code path around it. No `_msgSender()` override exists anywhere in `src/`, so OpenZeppelin's `AccessControlDefaultAdminRules._checkRole` always uses `msg.sender`, guaranteeing unauthorized callers revert.
